title: The Straw Hats Turn the Tide
description: On pages 17–18, the straw hats turn the tide focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.
scene: On pages 17–18, the straw hats turn the tide focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: don't pay any heed to that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's nothing at all, you half-fish mutant!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: didn't I already tell you to never call me that again,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: brother usopp, is that you!? You're so brave!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Are you alright!? Where are you!? What a bold entrance you're making!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami! I, all alone, took down one of their officers! All by myself!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey! Can you try to pull yourself out on your own?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: No, I can't feel any strength in my body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I won't let you do as you please...!

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
